component.name: secure-terminal
component.summary: A terminal where paste is safe by construction

description.p: secure-terminal is a small terminal for pasting commands into, and reading text out of, without worrying about invisible characters, bidi overrides or escape sequences. Its default display is printable ASCII only and it interprets no escape sequences from program output, so a pasted or printed lie cannot redraw or reorder what you see. Paste is sanitized to ASCII before it reaches the shell.

An opt-in, clearly indicated TUI mode can run full-screen programs (ssh, an editor, htop) and the shell's completion menus by interpreting escapes inside an isolated screen model that still filters every character and cannot touch the window title or system clipboard. The strict line mode remains the safe-by-construction default.
